name: Asylum Nightmares
short_description: In Asylum Nightmares, explore a terrifying asylum in two game modes: in story mode, use a service elevator to light up the floors and eliminate zombies; in horde mode, survive waves, earn points, and unlock weapons and rooms. Dare to face your nightmares!
detailed_description:
Asylum Nightmares is a survival horror game set in a terrifying asylum filled with zombies. The game features two main modes, each offering a unique but equally challenging experience.

Story Mode:

  • Objective: Descend through the different floors of the asylum using a service elevator.

  • Restore the power: Each floor is completely dark, and your first task is to find a way to turn the lights on.

  • Face the zombies: Every floor is infested with undead who will try to stop you. You must eliminate them all to progress.

  • Weapons and ammo: You will find new weapons and ammunition on each floor to help you survive.

  • Limited resources: Manage your resources wisely, as ammunition might be scarce.

Horde Mode:

  • Zombie waves: Face endless waves of zombies in a fight for survival.

  • Points system: Every zombie you kill will give you points, which you can use to unlock new areas of the asylum.

  • Weapon unlocks: You can also use points to unlock more powerful weapons to withstand the waves.

  • Zombie rewards: Some zombies will drop items upon death, such as:

    • Health to recover.

    • Extra ammunition.

    • "X2" to double the points earned for a limited time.

  • Increasing difficulty: Each wave will be harder than the last, testing your skill and endurance.

Asylum Nightmares delivers a terrifying experience with an oppressive and tension-filled atmosphere, combined with fast-paced and frantic action. Will you survive the nightmare or become lost in the asylum's dark corridors?
